item.description: Arctic Ocean food chain is disrupted as a key tipping point has now been passed  Phys.orgArctic ocean passes 'irreversible' chemical tipping point  Oceanographic MagazineArctic Ocean passed a tipping point and scientists say it may never recover  ScienceDailyMelting of Arctic ice has exposed shallow waters to more sunlight and accelerated a process that reduces nitrate, an essential nutrient for sustaining the marine food chain.  CPG Click Petróleo e Gás'Profound implications': Study finds Arctic Ocean ecosystem may have already passed 'major tipping point' in 2009  BusinessGreen
